posts.author: kaytay (Kaylee Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Automation to create a workspace when a workform submission is received/new item is created.

What are you trying to achieve

When a new form response is received, I’m looking for a new workspace to be automatically created (automatically named after a column in the form’s response table) and to pull pre-selected template boards, similar to the automation to create a slack channel when an item is created.
